title: Halloween Decorations
description: A Datapack that adds 30 new spooky craftable decorations to the game with no resourcepack required!
body:
# 🎃 Halloween Decorations [1.21.10]

This simple Datapack adds **30** new spooky craftable decorations to the game that can be placed using an armour stand!


##### This datapack does NOT require a resourcepack! It is 100% Vanilla!

## Check out the full list of decorations [HERE](https://yoavtc.github.io/halloween-decorations/)!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/7WgCviCF7Q0?si=6OhzdYZZgtFnPbux" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Check out my other datapacks:
[![recent datapacks](https://yoavtc.work/widgets/recent_datapacks.jpg)](https://modrinth.com/user/yoav_tc)


# Credits:
[BD Models](https://block-display.com/) for hosting a vast library of Block Display models, and the [Block Display Minecraft](https://discord.com/invite/VCeHfSd6Xa) community for creating them!
